title: I Know When You Dead: Suicide Village
original_title: Aku Tahu Kapan Kamu Mati: Desa Bunuh Diri
overview: Where Siena is experiencing depression due to being able to see someone's death sign. Even in this situation, she tries to help the people of Remetuk Village who are shrouded in a suicide mystery.
